mapper.select: SELECT id, med_case_id, case_report, physician, tcm_disease, wm_disease, tcm_symptoms, wm_symptoms, urination_defecation, pulse_condition, tongue_appearance, tcm_syndrome, tcm_treatment, prescription, herb_composition, created_at, updated_at FROM medical_cases WHERE med_case_id = #{caseId}

SELECT p.id, p.tcm_prescription_id AS tcmPrescriptionId, p.name_zh AS nameZh, p.pinyin_name AS pinyinName, p.source, p.indications_zh AS indicationsZh, p.indications_en AS indicationsEn, p.effects, p.effects_zh AS effectsZh FROM tcm_prescriptions p INNER JOIN medical_case_prescription_rel mc ON p.tcm_prescription_id = mc.tcm_prescription_id WHERE mc.med_case_id = #{caseId} ORDER BY p.id ASC

SELECT h.id, h.tcm_herb_id AS tcmHerbId, h.herb_name_zh AS herbNameZh, h.pinyin_name AS pinyinName, h.latin_name AS latinName, h.english_name AS englishName, h.type, h.efficacy_zh AS efficacyZh, h.function_en AS functionEn, h.efficacy_category AS efficacyCategory FROM core_tcm_herbs h INNER JOIN medical_case_herb_rel mh ON h.tcm_herb_id = mh.tcm_herb_id WHERE mh.med_case_id = #{caseId} ORDER BY h.id ASC

SELECT id, med_case_id, case_report, physician, tcm_disease, wm_disease, tcm_symptoms, wm_symptoms, urination_defecation, pulse_condition, tongue_appearance, tcm_syndrome, tcm_treatment, prescription, herb_composition FROM medical_cases
med_case_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR case_report LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR physician LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tcm_disease LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR wm_disease LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tcm_symptoms LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR wm_symptoms LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR urination_defecation LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pulse_condition LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tongue_appearance LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC
